sources.name: UNESCO World Heritage Centre / site-level reference
sources.notes: UNESCO recognition supports context; publication imagery requires item-level rights clearance.

sources.name: GBIF species occurrence and taxonomy reference
sources.notes: Species data can inform context; visual assets require rights-cleared imagery.

sources.name: Library of Congress public-domain/open collections
sources.notes: Item-level confirmation still required before publication.

sources.name: Smithsonian Open Access
sources.notes: Open Access content is generally reusable; item metadata should be retained.

sources.name: Public domain historical maps
sources.notes: Public-domain map candidates require item-level source citation.

sources.name: Partner or cultural sensitivity review source
sources.notes: Culturally sensitive or partner-governed content cannot publish without review.

sources.name: Public climate/geospatial data requiring original design
sources.notes: Data sources and derived design attribution must be verified.
